zh.Bures St. Mary, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可布勒斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Waldegrave於1504年出生在英國藍卡爾斯馬爾布利其時，她的父親William Waldegrave42歲，母親Margery Wentworth51歲。她於1527年與John Spring在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1564年4月10日在英國英格蘭素福爾可考費爾德享年60歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可考費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy Waldegrave于1504年出生在英国藍卡爾斯馬爾布利其时，她的父亲William Waldegrave42岁，母亲Margery Wentworth51岁。她于1527年与John Spring在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1564年4月10日在英国英格兰素福爾可考費爾德享年60岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可考費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Waldegrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Walgrave (Northants), which is recorded as Waldgrave in 1086.

variants.name: Woolgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a late variant of   Waldegrave  .

variants.name: Allgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a variant of   Waldegrave  .

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Waldegrave was born in 1504, in Smallbridge, Lancashire, England, her father, William Waldegrave, was 42 and her mother, Margery Wentworth, was 51. She married John Spring in 1527, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 10 April 1564, in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Cockfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Waldegrave est née en 1504, à Smallbridge, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Waldegrave, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margery Wentworth, avait 51 ans. Elle a épousé John Spring en 1527, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1564, à Cockfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Cockfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothy Waldegrave 1504 in Smallbridge, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Waldegrave 42 und ihre Mutter Margery Wentworth 51. Sie hat 1527 in Suffolk, England John Spring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. April 1564 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Cockfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cockfield, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Waldegrave è nata il nel 1504 nel Smallbridge, Lancashire, England, sua padre, William Waldegrave, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Margery Wentworth, aveva 51 anni. Lei sposato John Spring nel 1527, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 aprile 1564, nel Cockfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Cockfield, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Waldegraveが1504年にイギリスランカシュアイアスマルブリッジで生まれた時，父William Waldegraveは42歳，母Margery Wentworthは51歳であった。1527年にイギリススフォルクでJohn Springと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1564年4月10日にイギリスイギリススフォルクコクフィールドで60歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクコクフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Waldegrave(이)가 1504년 영국 랭카실르 스몰브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Waldegrave(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Wentworth(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 1527년 영국 수폴크에서 John Spring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1564년 4월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 콕필드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 콕필드에 묻혔다.

mn.Bures St. Mary, Suffolk, England: Bures, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Waldegrave nasceu em 1504, em Smallbridge, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Waldegrave, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margery Wentworth, tinha 51 anos. Ela casou-se com John Spring em 1527, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1564, em Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Waldegrave родилась в 1504 г. в местности смаллбридж, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Waldegrave было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Wentworth, 51. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Spring в 1527 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 апреля 1564 г. в местности коккфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности коккфиелд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dorothy Waldegrave nació en 1504, en Smallbridge, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Waldegrave, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margery Wentworth, tenía 51 años. Se casó con John Spring en 1527, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de abril de 1564, en Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Cockfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
